description_long: This is a medium-sized bird with a robust body, short neck, and a small rounded head. Its plumage is predominantly gray with darker wingtips and tail feathers, and a subtle iridescent sheen on the neck area. The wings are long and pointed, extending outward in flight, while the tail is short and slightly rounded. The beak is short, straight, and conical, typical of seed-eating birds. Its legs are slender and pinkish, ending in three forward-facing toes and one backward-facing toe. The overall appearance and coloration are characteristic of a common city-dwelling pigeon.
description: A gray, robust-bodied bird with pointed wings, iridescent neck, and pink legs, resembling a city pigeon.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bird's head, chest, and fully outstretched wings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the bird's profile, wing, and pink legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the spread wings, tail, and back plumage.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, wing, and pink legs.
attribute_plumage_pattern: Solid gray body with darker wingtips, iridescent neck, and subtle banding on wings and tail
